A [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] [[Spy/Legends|spy]], [[Ensign/Legends|Ensign]] '''Waldron''' infiltrated the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] base on [[Argavat]] and stole the [[Imperial Battle Codes]]. When the base commander realized the theft, the garrison was put under full alert, and Waldron was unable to escape. Lying low in the base, he hid the codes inside [[Astromech droid/Legends|astromech]] unit [[IP-8]] until [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] showed up to extract him.
